name: frontend-craft
description: Shared Claude Code plugin for frontend teams — agents, skills, hooks, and project templates for code review, design-to-code, architecture planning, security review, and UI debugging. All reports auto-saved as Markdown.

metadata.description: Shared Claude Code plugin for frontend teams

plugins.name: frontend-craft
plugins.description: Enterprise frontend team Claude Code plugin — 9 agents, 14 skills, 3 commands, 13 project rule templates, and production-ready hooks for code review, typescript-reviewer, frontend code-reviewer, frontend-security-reviewer, and frontend-e2e-runner agents, security review skill, performance optimization, scaffolding, design-to-code (Figma/Sketch/MasterGo/Pixso/墨刀/摹客), legacy-to-modern migration with refactoring constraints (images, styles, flex, no inline SVG/styles), E2E testing skill, Next.js/Nuxt/monorepo standards, CI/CD, architecture planning, and UI debugging with multi-design-tool MCP integration. All reports auto-saved as Markdown files to reports/ directory.
